D:\ProgramFiles\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\SDL3_mixer-shared.dir/objects.a
D:\ProgramFiles\MSYS2\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\SDL3_mixer-shared.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\SDL3_mixer-shared.dir\objects1.rsp
d:\ProgramFiles\MSYS2\mingw64\bin\gcc.exe -g -shared -static-libgcc -Wl,--version-script=F:/ParasiteEngine/SDL_mixer/src/SDL_mixer.sym -Wl,--no-undefined -o ..\Debug\SDL3_mixer.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libSDL3_mixer.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,1 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\SDL3_mixer-shared.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\SDL3_mixer-shared.dir\linkLibs.rsp
